title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Ben Luisi's team at the University of Cambridge uses AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to accelerate the discovery of bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics. The AI-driven approach compresses analysis that historically took years into minutes, addressing the global antimicrobial resistance crisis.
